name: White Sardine
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白鰯</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホワイト・サーディン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can send 1 "White Sardine" from your Deck to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except WATER monsters. You can only use this effect of "White Sardine" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can treat it as a Tuner this turn.
mnst_eff: You can send 1 "White Sardine" from your Deck to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except WATER monsters. You can only use this effect of "White Sardine" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can treat it as a Tuner this turn.
eff: You can send 1 "White Sardine" from your Deck to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except WATER monsters. You can only use this effect of "White Sardine" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can treat it as a Tuner this turn.

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
